title: Random Crafting
description: All recipes are messed up by this mod. You may be able to get a stick from a iron block, or get a netherite ingot from three cobblestones. Can you still beat the game?
body:
All recipes are messed up by this mod.

You may be able to get a stick from a iron block, or get a netherite ingot from three cobblestones.

Can you still beat the game?

With this mod, you can fool your friends, make the game harder and more hilarious (maybe especially in live streams or modpacks?), and do whatever you want!
